tags.name: Filings
tags.description: Query and retrieve SEC filings and filing documents

tags.name: Entities
tags.description: SEC registrants (identity: CIK, ticker, entity class)

tags.name: Insiders
tags.description: Insider transactions, ownership, activity, and related signals

tags.name: Institutions
tags.description: Institutional investors (13F): portfolios, ownership, flows, and smart-money activity

get.description: Returns SEC filings with pagination metadata and the normalized filters used for the query.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Include filings on or after this filing date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Include filings on or before this filing date

get.description: Returns active SEC form types from the database with pagination metadata, for use in the filings filter UI.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page

get.description: Returns every filing that matches the given SEC accession number.

get.summary: Get a filing by CIK and accession number
get.description: Returns a single filing identified by the unique CIK and accession number pair.
Returns the documents that belong to a filing identified by CIK and accession number.
Returns SEC entities with pagination and the normalized filters used for the query.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on entity name

get.description: Returns SEC Standard Industrial Classification codes from the database with pagination metadata, for use in entity filters and reference lookups.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page

get.summary: Get entity by CIK or ticker
get.description: Resolves the path segment as a 10-digit CIK when it is numeric, otherwise as a primary ticker symbol.

404.description: No entity matches the identifier

get.description: Returns filings for the entity resolved by CIK (numeric) or primary ticker, using the same filters as the filings collection.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: CIK (digits only, e.g. 0000320193) or ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per page

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Include filings on or after this filing date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Include filings on or before this filing date

get.description: Ticker, CIK, paged filings

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Exact ticker symbol (case-insensitive). Ignored when `cik` is supplied.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: Numeric CIK (zero-padding optional; padded on output). Takes precedence over `ticker`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum filings to return per page (capped at 100)

400.description: Something in your request is missing or not valid. Check the fields and try again.

get.description: Labels, codes, taxonomy

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search words (matches names, codes, or descriptions)

parameters.name: custom
parameters.description: true = company-specific custom lines only; false = standard lines only

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return per page

parameters.description: Optional keyword to narrow to one statement section (partial match on statement id)

get.description: Time-series values for raw SEC tags and/or canonical metrics across filings. Search by ticker or CIK.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: Company CIK (zero-padding optional). Takes precedence over ticker.

parameters.name: symbols
parameters.description: Comma-separated canonical metric storage keys and/or raw SEC tag local names

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Optional taxonomy version filter for raw SEC tags

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Include periods ending on or after this date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Include periods ending on or before this date

parameters.name: qtrs
parameters.description: Optional fiscal quarter span filter: 0 = instant, 1 = quarter, 4 = annual

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum periods to return per metric

400.description: Something in your request is missing or not valid. Check the fields and try again.

404.description: Metric time series not found

get.description: Precalculated ratio metrics from canonical SEC data. Search by ticker or CIK.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: Company CIK (zero-padding optional). Takes precedence over ticker.

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.description: Comma-separated ratio identifiers. Omit for all ratios in the group.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Include periods ending on or after this date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Include periods ending on or before this date

parameters.name: qtrs
parameters.description: Optional fiscal quarter span filter: 0 = instant, 1 = quarter, 4 = annual

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum periods to return per ratio

400.description: Something in your request is missing or not valid. Check the fields and try again.

404.description: Calculated ratios not found

get.description: Ranks companies by comparable annual or quarterly canonical metric values.

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: Canonical metric storage key, such as revenue or total_assets

parameters.name: quarterly
parameters.description: true = quarterly ranking, false or omitted = annual ranking

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Fiscal/calendar year to rank. For annual requests, omit it to use the latest completed year.

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: Quarter number for quarterly rankings. Defaults to the current quarter when quarterly=true.

400.description: Something in your request is missing or not valid. Check the fields and try again.

404.description: Metric ranking not found

get.description: Ranks companies by the latest comparable calculated ratio value. Example: top companies by gross margin.

parameters.name: qtrs

get.summary: Holdings summary for an insider person
get.description: Aggregated current positive ownership snapshot positions grouped by issuer for the insider, excluding expired derivative positions. Totals are heuristic sums of snapshot positions, not SEC-certified total beneficial ownership; double-counting or omission is possible across trusts, ownership forms, derivatives, and share classes. Class A, Class B, and other security titles are kept separate in securityTypes and are also included in issuer-level totals.

parameters.name: includeDerivative
parameters.description: When false, exclude derivative ownership positions. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: includeNonDerivative
parameters.description: When false, exclude non-derivative ownership positions. Defaults to true.

200.description: Insider person holdings summary returned successfully

400.description: Something in your request is missing or not valid. Check the fields and try again.

currentAum.description: Current disclosed portfolio value in USD

aumChange.description: Current minus previous disclosed portfolio value in USD

aumChangePercent.description: Percent change in disclosed portfolio value

reportedValueReturnPercent.description: Reported value return proxy from 13F values, not a true time-weighted return

positionCountChange.description: Current minus previous holding row count

securityCountChange.description: Current minus previous distinct CUSIP count

additionsCount.description: Positions present in current quarter but not prior quarter

disposalsCount.description: Positions present in prior quarter but not current quarter

increasedCount.description: Existing positions with higher reported value than prior quarter

decreasedCount.description: Existing positions with lower reported value than prior quarter

additionsValue.description: Reported value of additions in USD

disposalsValue.description: Prior reported value of disposals in USD

increasedValue.description: Positive reported value changes on existing positions in USD

decreasedValue.description: Absolute negative reported value changes on existing positions in USD
